text: In the last session, I'd like to continue with a few questions about the fact that in fourth density red, orange, and green energies will be activated, yellow, blue, etc., being in potentiation. Right now, you say we have green energies activated, they have been activated for the last 45 years. I'm wondering about the transition from uh through this period so that the green is totally activated and the yellow is in potentiation. What will we lose as the yellow goes from activation into potentiation? And what will we gain as the green comes into total activation? And what is that process? I am Ra. It is misleading to speak of gains and losses when dealing with the subject of the cycle's ending and the a green array, a cycle, a beginning upon your sphere. It is to be kept in the forefront of the faculties of intelligence that there is one creation in which there is no loss. There are progressive cycles for experiential use by entities. We may now address your query as the green array, a cycle, or the density of love and understanding begins to take shape. There will come a time when third density may again cycle on the yellow ray sphere. Meanwhile, there is another sphere congruent to a great extent with yellow ray forming this fourth, the density sphere coexists with a first, second, and third. It is of a denser nature due to the rotational core atomic aspects of its material. We have discussed this subject with you, the a fourth identity, entities which incarnate at this space time our fourth density in the view of experience, but are incarnating in less dense vehicles due to a desire to experience and aid in the birth of fourth density upon this plane, you may note that fourth density entities have a great abundance of compassion.

Right now, you say we have green energies activated, they have been activated for the last 45 years.
I'm wondering about the transition from uh through this period so that the green is totally activated and the yellow is in potentiation.
What will we lose as the yellow goes from activation into potentiation?
And what will we gain as the green comes into total activation?
It is misleading to speak of gains and losses when dealing with the subject of the cycle's ending and the a green array, a cycle, a beginning upon your sphere.
It is to be kept in the forefront of the faculties of intelligence that there is one creation in which there is no loss.

It is of a denser nature due to the rotational core atomic aspects of its material.

We have discussed this subject with you, the a fourth identity, entities which incarnate at this space time our fourth density in the view of experience, but are incarnating in less dense vehicles due to a desire to experience and aid in the birth of fourth density upon this plane, you may note that fourth density entities have a great abundance of compassion.
